about.hero_subtitle: Defining luxury and elegance in the heart of Damanhour.
about.story_desc1: Founded in Damanhour, Moda House began with a simple vision: to bring world-class luxury perfumes and accessories to our local community. We believe that everyone deserves to experience the confidence that comes with high-quality scents and elegant styling.
about.story_desc2: Over the years, we have grown into a destination for those who appreciate the finer things in life, carefully selecting each piece in our collection to ensure it meets our rigorous standards of quality and craftsmanship.
about.vision_desc1: To be the leading luxury lifestyle brand in Egypt, known for our commitment to quality, authenticity, and exceptional customer service.
about.vision_desc2: We strive to create a shopping experience that is as memorable as the products we sell, building lasting relationships with our customers through trust and excellence.
about.origin_desc1: Moda House was born in the heart of Damanhour with a singular purpose: to curate a sanctuary for those who seek the extraordinary in every scent and accessory.
about.origin_desc2: What started as a boutique collection has evolved into a hallmark of refined taste, blending oriental heritage with contemporary luxury.
about.feature1_desc: We source only the most premium leathers and rare essences from the world's most renowned artisans.
about.feature2_desc: Our pieces are designed to transcend trends, becoming heirlooms that tell a story for generations.
about.vision_hero_title: Luxury, Redefined for the Modern Era.
about.vision_hero_desc: Our mission is to empower individual expression through accessories that embody the pinnacle of global fashion.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.subtitle: Have a question? We'd love to hear from you.
contact.success_desc: We've received your message and will get back to you shortly.
contact.error: There was an error sending your message. Please try again later.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about shopping with Moda House.
faq.a1: Delivery typically takes 1-3 business days within Cairo and Alexandria, and 3-5 days for other governorates.
faq.a2: Yes, we ship to select countries in the Middle East and Europe. Rates vary by destination.
faq.a3: Absolutely. We pride ourselves on sourcing only 100% authentic, premium oriental and international essences.
faq.q4: Can I return a scarf if it doesn't fit?
faq.a4: Yes, we offer a 14-day return policy for unused scarves in their original packaging.

shipping.title: Shipping Policy
shipping.domestic_desc: We provide premium delivery services across all governorates in Egypt. Our logistics partners are selected for their reliability and care in handling luxury goods.
shipping.tracking_desc: Once your order is dispatched, you will receive a tracking number via email and SMS. You can also track your order directly through your account dashboard or our tracking page.
shipping.intl_desc: Currently, Moda House ships to select countries in the Middle East and Europe. International delivery typically takes 7-14 business days. Please note that customs duties and taxes may apply depending on your country's regulations.

refund.title: Returns & Exchanges
refund.subtitle: Ensuring your absolute satisfaction
refund.guarantee_desc: We take immense pride in the quality of our products. If you are not entirely satisfied with your purchase, you may return the item(s) within 14 days of receipt for a full refund or exchange.
refund.conditions_intro: To be eligible for a return, your item must be:
refund.cond1: In its original, unused condition (unworn, unwashed).
refund.cond2: In the original premium packaging with all tags attached.
refund.cond3: Accompanied by the original invoice or proof of purchase.
refund.note_desc: Specialized items such as opened perfumes and bespoke accessories cannot be returned due to hygiene and customization reasons.
refund.step1: Contact our concierge team at returns@modahouse.com with your order number.
refund.step2: Securely package the item in its original box.
refund.step3: Our courier will collect the package from your doorstep within 48 hours.
refund.process_desc: Once your return is received and inspected, we will notify you of the approval or rejection of your refund. Approved refunds will be processed via your original payment method within 5-7 business days.

cancellation.title: Order Cancellation Policy
cancellation.subtitle: Simple and transparent process
cancellation.how_to_desc: We understand that plans can change. To cancel your order, please follow these steps:
cancellation.step1_title: Contact us through our official channels:
cancellation.whatsapp: WhatsApp: Send a message to our store number.
cancellation.instagram: Instagram: Send a DM to our store page.
cancellation.step2: Provide your order details (Order ID and Email).
cancellation.step3: Wait for our staff to reply. We typically respond within 2-3 business days.
cancellation.step4: Provide the mobile number or Visa card details you wish to receive your cashback on.
cancellation.confirmation_desc: Once your order has been successfully cancelled, you will receive a confirmation email naturally updating you on the status.
cancellation.note_desc: Orders that have already been shipped or are in the final stages of processing may not be eligible for cancellation. In such cases, please refer to our Refund Policy.
